# Self Publishing Consultant

## US Service Tiers
1. Manuscript Assessment
2. Full Global Distribution
3. Executive Branding & Cover
4. Marketing Multiplier (SEO/Ads)
5. General Consultation

## Pricing
Pricing is entirely bespoke based on manuscript length and strategic goals. Book a direct consultation to discuss our tailored pricing for US-based indie authors.

## Trustpilot Rating
We maintain an industry-leading 5-star rating on Trustpilot. We are highly rated by US authors who highlight our direct, no-nonsense communication style and robust SEO distribution architecture. Our authors regularly feature as top-rated on Amazon.
